differential_diagnoses: Meconium aspiration syndrome with focal air trapping
next_steps: Chest computed tomography (CT) with intravenous contrast
Genetic consultation and DICER1 mutation analysis
Serial imaging to assess for mass progression or secondary infection
Consideration of fine-needle aspiration or biopsy if malignancy is suspected

differential_diagnoses: Secondary bacterial pneumonia with persistent consolidation
next_steps: Contrast-enhanced chest computed tomography (CT) to evaluate for airway/parenchymal structure and anomalous vascular supply
Genetic counseling and DICER1 mutation testing
Pediatric thoracic surgery consultation for potential biopsy or excision
Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) to rule out persistent infection
Comprehensive VACTERL association screening including spinal radiography and abdominal ultrasound
